name: Frank Signorelli
abstract: Frank Signorelli (May 24, 1901 – December 9, 1975) was an American jazz pianist.

about_quotes.speaker: Russell Procope
about_quotes.evidence: Frank Signorelli, people with the original Memphis Five or the Dixieland Jazz Band. See, my father used to buy all these records. And I'd play them at home and listen to them.

about_quotes.speaker: Dominic James "Nick" La Rocca
about_quotes.evidence: About 1920, Signorelli joined my band... Frankie stood with me from 1920, part of 1920, 21, and 22.

about_quotes.speaker: Dominic James "Nick" La Rocca
about_quotes.evidence: I gave Robertson his two weeks notice and replaced him with Frank Signorelli.

about_quotes.speaker: Loren M. "Tex" Brewster
about_quotes.evidence: there were a lot of them there was uh Frank Signorelli uh what I know him
